title: Addis Window, Glass Squeegee With Built In Spray System And Bottle, White Blue
features: Simply Spray and squeegee down the house window, shower glass, car or caravan windows
Features Spray system and cleaning fluid reservoir
Dimensions w25.4 x d4.5 x h23.5cm
Addis part of the home since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Easy Storage The squeegee has an area that allows it to be easily stored away as it can fit neatly on the hook. Spray Feature With a spray feature that allows you to easily spray detergent as you clean. Rubber Lip The rubber lip ensures the liquid gets captured to leave a streak-free, gleaming finish.
